description: Sacra Corona Unita is a Mafia-type criminal organization from the Apulia region in Southern Italy, founded in the early 1980s by Pino Rogoli. It is active in areas such as Brindisi, Lecce, and Taranto, and engages in cigarette smuggling, arms trafficking, drug trafficking, human trafficking, money laundering, extortion, and political corruption. The group was formed to counter the power of other mafia organizations in prisons and Apulian territory. After arrests and defections in the early 2000s, it no longer exists as a single viable organization.

country_links.evidence_quote: The organization has long been present in Albania, partly because of the proximity of Apulia and Albania and the diffusion of the Italian language. Albania is a point of arrival for huge quantities of smuggled cigarettes and drugs from Afghanistan.
country_links.context: The organization has long been present in Albania, using it as a point of arrival for smuggled cigarettes and drugs.

country_links.evidence_quote: While the organization does not have consolidated structures in Germany, it is known that the Rogoli-Buccarella-Donatiello clan, the Padovano clan, the Tornese clan and the Mesagnesi clan have a presence in the country. The Coca-family investigation documented large cocaine trafficking from Germany to the province of Brindisi.
country_links.context: The organization has a presence in Germany, with documented cocaine trafficking from Germany to the province of Brindisi.

country_links.evidence_quote: Spain is considered a logistical base for the trafficking operations of the organization. SCU fugitives have been stopped in seaside resorts south of Barcelona.
country_links.context: Spain is considered a logistical base for the trafficking operations of the organization.

country_links.evidence_quote: In the United Kingdom the Sacra Corona Unita is believed to invest dirty money in hotels and in the tourism sector.
country_links.context: The organization is believed to invest dirty money in hotels and the tourism sector in the United Kingdom.

country_links.evidence_quote: The US FBI say: 'Very few members of the Sacra Corona Unita have been identified in the United States, although some individuals in Illinois, Florida and New York would have ties with the organization.'
country_links.context: Some individuals in Illinois, Florida and New York have ties with the organization.
